name: browser_hover
description:
Hover over element on page.
IMPORTANT: This triggers JavaScript mouse events (mouseover, mouseenter, etc.) only.
It does NOT trigger CSS :hover pseudo-class styles. If a UI element relies purely on CSS :hover for visual changes, those changes will NOT appear after this action.
Use this tool when the page uses JavaScript event listeners to show/hide content on hover.

element.description: Human-readable element description used to obtain permission to interact with the element

ref.description: Exact target element reference from the page snapshot

viewId.description: Target browser tab ID. If omitted, uses the last interacted tab.
